strengths: 20+ years of continuous engineering across embedded systems, high-throughput microservices (millions of requests/second at Dunnhumby), mobile, web, and now AI-agent infrastructure — comfortably clears the 15-year minimum with cross-domain depth that directly supports a cloud-and-AI strategy mandate.

Current hands-on AI builder work at re:cinq includes MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks, providing recent, production-grade credibility in the exact AI tooling layer the role targets — not merely theoretical familiarity.

Consistent entrepreneurial thread: founded and maintains GISCollective (open-source geo-data platform used in production by Green Map globally), authored multiple open-source D-language libraries, delivered a FOSS4G conference talk, and ran full-day public workshops — demonstrating the external inspiration and knowledge-sharing dimension the role explicitly requires.
concerns: No Master's or PhD in an AI-related field; the role lists this as a preferred qualification, and competing Director-level IC candidates are likely to hold advanced AI credentials.

Current and recent titles (Staff Software Engineer, Senior Software Developer) sit below the Director-level IC seniority the role targets, representing a meaningful step-up rather than a lateral move.

Customer- and partner-facing AI advisory experience is not evidenced in the resume; the AI work at re:cinq reads as internal tooling and infrastructure rather than strategic advisory engagements with enterprise customers.
response.justification: Bogdan brings over two decades of hands-on engineering spanning low-latency systems, full-stack product work, infrastructure, and now active AI-agent tooling — a rare combination of depth and breadth that gives a Principal AI Strategy role immediate technical credibility. His current work building MCP frameworks and agentic infrastructure at re:cinq places him at the precise frontier the role is designed to navigate, while his sustained entrepreneurial output (GISCollective, multiple open-source libraries, public workshops, and a conference talk) demonstrates the ability to build, ship, and inspire externally. The seniority gap is real but reflects trajectory rather than ceiling; the absence of a formal AI degree is materially offset by production-grade agentic AI work at exactly the moment that domain is most strategically relevant to the hiring organization.
